Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.BeanPropertyMeta

Packages that use BeanPropertyMeta
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
Bean-modeling layer for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.internal
Internal Utilities
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema
JSON-Schema Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
Parser API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
Serializer API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap
SOAP/XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support

  • Uses of BeanPropertyMeta in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean that return BeanPropertyMeta
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BeanPropertyMeta
    BeanPropertyMeta.Builder.build()
     
    BeanPropertyMeta
    BeanPropertyMeta.getDelegateFor()
    Returns the metadata on the property that this metadata is a delegate for.
    protected BeanPropertyMeta
    BeanMeta.getDynaProperty()
    Returns the "extras" property for dynamic bean properties.
    BeanPropertyMeta
    BeanMapEntry.getMeta()
    Returns the metadata about this bean property.
    final BeanPropertyMeta
    BeanPropertyValue.getMeta()
    Returns the bean property metadata.
    BeanPropertyMeta
    BeanMap.getPropertyMeta(String propertyName)
    Returns the metadata on the specified property.
    BeanPropertyMeta
    BeanMeta.getPropertyMeta(String name)
    Returns metadata about the specified property.
    BeanPropertyMeta
    BeanMeta.getTypeProperty()
    Returns a mock bean property that resolves to the name "_type" and whose value always resolves to the dictionary name of the bean.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean that return types with arguments of type BeanPropertyMeta
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Map<String,BeanPropertyMeta>
    BeanMeta.getHiddenProperties()
    Returns the map of hidden properties on this bean.
    protected Collection<BeanPropertyMeta>
    BeanMap.getProperties()
    Returns a simple collection of properties for this bean map.
    Map<String,BeanPropertyMeta>
    BeanMeta.getProperties()
    Returns a map of all properties on this bean.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean with parameters of type BeanPropertyMeta
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    BeanPropertyMeta.compareTo(BeanPropertyMeta o)
     
    BeanPropertyMeta.Builder
    BeanPropertyMeta.Builder.delegateFor(BeanPropertyMeta value)
    Sets the original bean property that this one is overriding.
    BeanRegistryLookup
    BeanMeta.getPropertyBeanRegistry(BeanPropertyMeta p)
    Returns the per-property registry lookup associated with the given BeanPropertyMeta.
    protected boolean
    BeanMap.isInActiveView(BeanPropertyMeta pMeta)
    Returns true if the property is visible under the active view on this bean map's session.
    default boolean
    BeanSession.isPropertyInActiveView(BeanPropertyMeta pMeta)
    Returns true if the specified bean property is visible under the current active view.
    Method parameters in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean with type arguments of type BeanPropertyMeta
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    BeanMap.forEachProperty(Predicate<BeanPropertyMeta> filter, Consumer<BeanPropertyMeta> action)
    Performs an action on each property in this bean map.
    BeanMap<T>
    BeanMap.forEachProperty(Predicate<BeanPropertyMeta> filter, Consumer<BeanPropertyMeta> action)
    Performs an action on each property in this bean map.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected final Object
    ParserSession.cast(MarshalledMap m, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta, ClassMeta<?> eType)
    Converts the specified MarshalledMap into a bean identified by the "_type" property in the map.

    Give the specified dictionary name, resolve it to a class.

    Called when an exception is thrown when trying to call a bean setter method.
    protected final void
    ParserSession.onBeanSetterException(BeanPropertyMeta p, Throwable t)
    Specialized warning when an exception is thrown while executing a bean setter.
    protected final void
    ParserSession.setCurrentProperty(BeanPropertyMeta currentProperty)
    Sets the current bean property being parsed for proper error messages.
